sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31081" key="ei(liko/morfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱλικό-μορφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἕλιξ</etym>) <sense id="n31081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of twisted</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spiral form</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
